# HigherMindAI

> AI client intake, AI search visibility and lead generation. I build an AI intake desk that answers every call and message 24/7, screens it and books the consultation - plus the visibility work that gets a business found on Google and named inside AI answers. Law firms are the specialty. Based in Ontario, Canada. Live in 14 days.

## Core pages
- [AI Intake Desk](https://highermindai.com/law-firm-intake): 24/7 answering, screening and booking on phone and web.
- [AI Search Optimization / GEO](https://highermindai.com/ai-search-optimization): getting named by ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Perplexity, Copilot and Google AI Overviews.
- [Ranking & Lead Generation](https://highermindai.com/law-firm-seo): Google Business Profile into the Map Pack top three, plus paid campaigns.
- [The Watershed](https://highermindai.com/the-watershed): the full system - all of the above welded into one loop.
- [Who I Help](https://highermindai.com/solutions): law firms first; also accountants, clinics, trades, real estate and other appointment-led businesses.
- [About](https://highermindai.com/about): founder background - close to a decade inside the justice system.
- [Book a call](https://highermindai.com/book/): phone 647-242-5800.

## Key facts
- Operated by a single practitioner, not an agency. The person who sells the work does the work.
- Practice areas served best: personal injury, family and divorce, criminal defence, immigration.
- The intake desk does administrative intake only and never gives legal advice.
- Guarantees: first page of Google Maps in 60 days or you stop paying; live in 14 days or the build fee is returned.
- Serves clients across Canada.
